title: Beta Combat
description: Beta-Combat replaces the default critical hit particles, damage indicator hearts and sweep attack animation with custom purple visuals. Lightweight, no textures — just combat effects.
body: Beta-Combat is a lightweight resource pack that replaces vanilla combat visuals with a custom purple aesthetic. Critical hit particles, damage indicator hearts and sweep attack animation have all been overhauled. No textures, no bloat — just clean combat effects. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.
